contentBlocks.text: If you’d like to find out more about become a client and training at the gym, working as a PT - or to have a look at our facilities at the gym, please get in touch.
Located in the heart of Shoreditch, The Vault is easily accessible from Old Street, Liverpool Street and Shoreditch High Street stations.

Lower Ground Floor
Zetland House
5-25 Scrutton Street
London
EC2A 4HJ

seo.title: Contact The Vault Private Gym | Luxury Personal Training Gym in Shoreditch, London
seo.description: Looking for a premium private gym in Central London? The Vault Gym in Shoreditch offers exclusive personal training, just minutes from Old Street, Moorgate and Liverpool Street stations. Contact us today.
